productDisplayName: Nike Men Jordan Fly Wade Red Sports Shoes
description: nike are proud to present to you a shoe crafted to support the absolute best performance in Basketball. D Wade's signature shoe is precisely engineered for his gravity defying game, and you can litterally walk in his shoes with this pair from nike! The superior performance features that have been lovingly incorporated into this high top shoe are equally matched by the unparalleled stylish look. You'll only really understand what makes this shoe unique when you put them on - constructed to enhance the game of one of the world's top athletes, you'll feel the difference.UpperRevolutionary hyperfuse composite construction reduces weight and allows for a nearly seamless upperUltra responsive Lunarlon cushioningMolded Ortholire sockliner delivers plush in-step comfort and cushioningAsymetrical collar Sports an anatomically shaped internal heel pad to reduce slippageMidsoleA 3/4 length TPU shank adds torsional rigidityPhylon carrier in the heelFull length Lunarlon midsole for impact cushioningOutsoleDurable solid rubber outsole with multi-directional traction pattern allows you to launch from any surfaceTactical flex groovesShoe careDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust and dirt with dry clean cloth
